Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureEventHubsResource

# Enum Types
enum:Aspire.Hosting.AzureEventHubsRole = AzureEventHubsDataOwner | AzureEventHubsDataReceiver | AzureEventHubsDataSender

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/addAzureEventHubs(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureEventHubsResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/addConsumerGroup(name: string, groupName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureEventHubConsumerGroupResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/addHub(name: string, hubName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureEventHubResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/runAsEmulator(configureContainer?: callback) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureEventHubsResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/withConfigurationFile(path: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureEventHubsEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/withEventHubsRoleAssignments(target: Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureEventHubsResource, roles: enum:Aspire.Hosting.AzureEventHubsRole[]) -> Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/withHostPort(port: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureEventHubsEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/withProperties(configure: callback) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.EventHubs/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureEventHubResource
